title: bidens bigelovii var. typica
intro: Bidens bigelovii var. typica, also known as Bigelow's bidens, is a variety of flowering plant in the aster family, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Bidens bigelovii var. typica include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate symptoms associated with colds and flu.
